zh.Weston on the Green, Oxfordshire, Englan: 英國奧可福爾維斯頓---格林
zh.Saint Mary The Virgin, Thame, Oxfordshir: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾坦
zh.North Weston, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾諾斯 韋斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Quartermain於1313年出生在英國奧可福爾諾斯 韋斯頓時，他的父親William Quartermain54歲，母親Maude27歲。他於1337年與Katherine Bretton在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1342年6月6日在他的家鄉享年29歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Quartermain于1313年出生在英国奧可福爾諾斯 韋斯頓时，他的父亲William Quartermain54岁，母亲Maude27岁。他于1337年与Katherine Bretton在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1342年6月6日在他的家乡享年29岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾坦。

nameMeanings.name: Quartermain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Quarterman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Germaine, Marcel, Pascal.

English (Oxfordshire and Surrey): nickname from Anglo-Norman French quatre mayns, quatre mans ‘four hands’, which has been taken to imply ‘mail-fisted’ but was perhaps used of a skilled craftsman or a dextrous juggler or conjuror.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Quartermain was born in 1313, in North Weston, Oxfordshire, England, his father, William Quartermain, was 54 and his mother, Maude, was 27. He married Katherine Bretton in 1337, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 6 June 1342, in his hometown, at the age of 29, and was buried in Thame, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Quartermain est né en 1313, à North Weston, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Quartermain, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Maude, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Bretton en 1337, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 6 juin 1342, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Thame, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Quartermain 1313 in North Weston, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Quartermain 54 und seine Mutter Maude 27. Er hat 1337 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Katherine Bretton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 6. Juni 1342 im Alter von 29 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Thame, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Quartermain è nato il nel 1313 nel North Weston, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, William Quartermain, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Maude, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Bretton nel 1337, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 6 giugno 1342, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Thame, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Quartermainが1313年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアノース ウエストンで生まれた時，父William Quartermainは54歳，母Maudeは27歳であった。1337年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでKatherine Brettonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1342年6月6日に故郷で29歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアサムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Quartermain(이)가 1313년 영국 스퍼드실르 노르스 웨스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Quartermain(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1337년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Katherine Bretton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1342년 6월 6일 그의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 섬에 묻혔다.

mn.Saint Mary The Virgin, Thame, Oxfordshir: Thame, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Quartermain nasceu em 1313, em North Weston, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Quartermain, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Maude, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Bretton em 1337, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 6 de junho de 1342, em sua cidade natal, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Thame, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Quartermain родился в 1313 г. в местности норт вестон, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Quartermain было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Maude, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Bretton в 1337 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 6 июня 1342 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности там, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Quartermain nació en 1313, en North Weston, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Quartermain, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Maude, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Katherine Bretton en 1337, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 6 de junio de 1342, en su pueblo, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Thame, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
